subject: FW:
body:
From: pdiaz33@aol.com [mailto:pdiaz33@aol.com] 
Sent: Monday, May 19, 2008 10:14 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: 

 

hello lesley how are you? hopefully fine. i wanted to tell Jeffrey
thanks for introducing me to great people 
Rich barnetts, and his buddys at 40 wall street are trying to get me
into there building and it will be great because i will be with guys
that i know and that are good tell jeffrey i havent forgot about him and
not to forget about me also tell him i accomplished a few more
certifications and im keeping it up i havent sent you any letters for
him because im workin nights 12 am to 8 am and my body has not got
adjusted its tough but im hangin on strong also sorry for not stoping
and talking the other week i was rushing for work but it was nice to see
you all tell Jeffrey it would be nice to see him its been a while i
remember only seeing him when he waited for the elevator and thats more
than now well lesley i appreciate it and hope to hear from you soon

________________________________
